machine.name: Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Mental Health Shelter Referral
machine.description: Community-services machine for mental health shelter referral in the behavioral health and crisis workstream. It monitors unsheltered distress, shelter fit, clinical follow-up, and transport need and emits AI-triggered actions for health and human services, law enforcement/public safety coordination, homelessness response, and city operations.

metadata.domain: Community Services - Behavioral Health And Crisis
metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.focusDescription: unsheltered distress, shelter fit, clinical follow-up, and transport need
downstreamMachines: Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Youth Crisis Pathway
agentActions: Dispatch homeless_outreach_agent for urgent community-services intervention on mental health shelter referral.
Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for mental health shelter referral.
Create field work order or mobile team task for mental health shelter referral.
Maintain monitored service path for mental health shelter referral.
metadata.reuseGuideline: Map 311, case-management, CAD/RMS, shelter HMIS, benefit enrollment, outreach, public health, and transit-access signals into the 4D input lane. Route outputs to case workers, mobile crisis, public safety, housing navigators, field crews, transportation dispatch, or health-service agents.
metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [1096:1100] feeds Community Services Behavioral Health And Crisis Youth Crisis Pathway.

sequences.name: Mental Health Shelter Referral: WATCH -> URGENT_RESPONSE

metadata.description: Escalates resident or field risk into urgent response.

metadata.action: Dispatch homeless_outreach_agent for urgent community-services intervention on mental health shelter referral.

sequences.name: Mental Health Shelter Referral: COORDINATION_NEEDED -> COORDINATE_SERVICES

metadata.action: Coordinate health, housing, public safety, transportation, or city service partners for mental health shelter referral.

sequences.name: Mental Health Shelter Referral: FIELD_TASK_NEEDED -> FIELD_WORK_ORDER

metadata.description: Creates a field crew, outreach, or mobile response task.

metadata.action: Create field work order or mobile team task for mental health shelter referral.

sequences.name: Mental Health Shelter Referral: STABLE_PATH -> STABLE_SERVICE_PATH

metadata.description: Confirms resident service path is stable and monitored.

metadata.action: Maintain monitored service path for mental health shelter referral.

inputSequences.name: Urgent response sequence
inputSequences.description: Two-step community risk escalation ending in urgent response.

inputSequences.name: Coordinate services
inputSequences.description: Coordinates health, public safety, housing, transit, or city service partners.

inputSequences.name: Field work order
inputSequences.description: Creates a field response or outreach task.

inputSequences.name: Stable service path
inputSequences.description: Confirms the resident or city service path is stable.

inputSequences.name: Baseline without output
inputSequences.description: Initial observation arms the urgent path without firing.
